SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer, o.due_date::date as due_date,
       o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_at::date as created_at
FROM orders o
WHERE o.archived = false
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi
  WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
  HAVING BOOL_AND(oi.shipped_qty >= oi.qty)
)
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer, o.due_date::date as due_date,
       o.total_amount, o.status, o.created_at::date as created_at
FROM orders o
WHERE o.archived = false
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
  o.order_no,
  o.customer,
  o.due_date::date as due_date,
  o.created_at::date as created_at,
  COUNT(oi.id) as total_items,
  SUM(oi.qty) as total_qty,
  SUM(oi.amount) as total_amount,
  o.status
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.archived = false
GROUP BY o.id, o.order_no, o.customer, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.status
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

SELECT
  o.order_no,
  o.customer,
  o.due_date::date as due_date,
  o.created_at::date as created_at,
  COUNT(oi.id) as total_items,
  SUM(oi.qty) as total_qty,
  SUM(oi.amount) as total_amount,
  o.status
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.archived = false
GROUP BY o.id, o.order_no, o.customer, o.due_date, o.created_at, o.status
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO product_bom (product_id, part_id, default_qty, unit, sort_order)
VALUES (
  {{Tbl_products.selectedRow.id}},
  {{sel_bom_part.selectedOptionValue}},
  {{inp_bom_qty.text}},
  {{inp_bom_unit.text}},
  {{inp_bom_sort.text}}
)
ON CONFLICT (product_id, part_id) DO UPDATE
  SET default_qty = EXCLUDED.default_qty,
      unit = EXCLUDED.unit,
      sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order;

INSERT INTO product_bom (product_id, part_id, default_qty, unit, sort_order)
VALUES (
  {{Tbl_products.selectedRow.id}},

  {{inp_bom_unit.text}},
  {{inp_bom_sort.text}}
)
ON CONFLICT (product_id, part_id) DO UPDATE
  SET default_qty = EXCLUDED.default_qty,
      unit = EXCLUDED.unit,
      sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order;
DELETE FROM product_bom WHERE id = {{Tbl_bom.selectedRow.bom_id}};
DELETE FROM product_bom WHERE id = {{Tbl_bom.selectedRow.bom_id}};

SELECT id, order_no, customer, due_date::date AS due_date
FROM orders
WHERE archived = false
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT id, order_no, customer, due_date::date AS due_date
FROM orders
WHERE archived = false
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO order_materials
  (order_product_id, part_id, part_no, part_name, required_qty, actual_qty, unit, bom_expanded)
SELECT
  {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}},
  pb.part_id,
  p.part_no,
  p.part_name,
  pb.default_qty * {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.qty}},
  pb.default_qty * {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.qty}},
  pb.unit,
  TRUE
FROM product_bom pb
JOIN parts p ON p.id = pb.part_id
JOIN order_products op ON op.product_id = pb.product_id
WHERE op.id = {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}}
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM order_materials om2
    WHERE om2.order_product_id = {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}}
      AND om2.bom_expanded = TRUE
  );

INSERT INTO order_materials
  (order_product_id, part_id, part_no, part_name, required_qty, actual_qty, unit, bom_expanded)
SELECT
  {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}},
  pb.part_id,
  p.part_no,
  p.part_name,
  pb.default_qty * {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.qty}},
  pb.default_qty * {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.qty}},
  pb.unit,
  TRUE
FROM product_bom pb
JOIN parts p ON p.id = pb.part_id
JOIN order_products op ON op.product_id = pb.product_id
WHERE op.id = {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}}
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM order_materials om2
    WHERE om2.order_product_id = {{Tbl_order_products.selectedRow.id}}
      AND om2.bom_expanded = TRUE
  );

INSERT INTO order_processes
  (order_material_id, process_name, process_desc, std_hours, actual_hours, sort_order)
SELECT
  {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}},
  pp.process_name,
  pp.process_desc,
  pp.std_hours,
  pp.std_hours,
  pp.sort_order
FROM part_processes pp
WHERE pp.part_id = {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.part_id}}
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM order_processes op2
    WHERE op2.order_material_id = {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}}
  );

INSERT INTO order_processes
  (order_material_id, process_name, process_desc, std_hours, actual_hours, sort_order)
SELECT
  {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}},
  pp.process_name,
  pp.process_desc,
  pp.std_hours,
  pp.std_hours,
  pp.sort_order
FROM part_processes pp
WHERE pp.part_id = {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.part_id}}
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM order_processes op2
    WHERE op2.order_material_id = {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}}
  );

UPDATE order_processes
SET process_name = {{inp_proc_name.text}},
    process_desc  = {{inp_proc_desc.text}},
    actual_hours  = {{inp_proc_hours.text}},
    sort_order    = {{inp_proc_sort.text}},
    status        = {{sel_proc_status.selectedOptionValue}},
    note          = {{inp_proc_note.text}}
WHERE id = {{Tbl_order_processes.selectedRow.id}};

UPDATE order_processes
SET process_name = {{inp_proc_name.text}},
    process_desc  = {{inp_proc_desc.text}},
    actual_hours  = {{inp_proc_hours.text}},
    sort_order    = {{inp_proc_sort.text}},
    status        = {{sel_proc_status.selectedOptionValue}},
    note          = {{inp_proc_note.text}}
WHERE id = {{Tbl_order_processes.selectedRow.id}};

INSERT INTO order_processes
  (order_material_id, process_name, process_desc, actual_hours, sort_order, status)
VALUES (
  {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}},
  {{inp_proc_name.text}},
  {{inp_proc_desc.text}},
  {{inp_proc_hours.text}},
  {{inp_proc_sort.text}},
  'pending'
);

INSERT INTO order_processes
  (order_material_id, process_name, process_desc, actual_hours, sort_order, status)
VALUES (
  {{Tbl_order_materials.selectedRow.id}},
  {{inp_proc_name.text}},
  {{inp_proc_desc.text}},
  {{inp_proc_hours.text}},
  {{inp_proc_sort.text}},
  'pending'
);
DELETE FROM order_processes WHERE id = {{Tbl_order_processes.selectedRow.id}};
DELETE FROM order_processes WHERE id = {{Tbl_order_processes.selectedRow.id}};
